fields.name: Application ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the application that is being added.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the record.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the add-in.

fields.name: Version
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version of the record

fields.name: Manifest Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit where the Office add-in is defined for deployment.

fields.name: Deploy
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the add-in will be deployed.
